base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of keese_fly — a character from 1986 legend of zelda. Keese — small bat. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Keese — small bat; 2-frame wing-flap; dive-flies erratically around dungeon rooms
